summary: Internal tools platform aggressively pivoting toward AI workflows and agent infrastructure.

insights.insight: 12 open roles tagged 'Agents' or 'Workflows' across SF and NYC — Retool is rebuilding around agent orchestration as the core primitive.
Launched Retool Agents in October — pricing starts at $10/agent-run, putting them in direct lane with Zapier and n8n's AI tier.
Enterprise reviewers flag steep learning curve for non-technical operators — Retool is powerful but not yet self-serve for ops teams.
insights.evidence: G2 · 7 enterprise reviews in last 60 days

insights.insight: Hiring a 'Head of Developer Relations' for the first time — signals a push to win the agent-builder mindshare against LangChain and CrewAI.

emailSeed.subject: On Retool Agents and the operator gap
emailSeed.angle: Reference the 12 agent roles and the non-technical operator learning curve.
